_comment: SHA-256 checksums for bundled Factum-IL dependencies. Installer verifies all downloads against these hashes. Any mismatch is a hard build failure.

_notes.node.exe: Checksum depends on NodeVersion param in publish.ps1. Populated at build time.
_notes.OllamaSetup.exe: Ollama does not publish stable release checksums. Verified by size threshold (>20MB) during download.
_notes.gemma-4-E2B-it.BF16-mmproj.gguf: Canonical hash for BrainboxAI/law-il-E2B:Q4_K_M GGUF. Build fails if download hash differs.
_notes.MicrosoftEdgeWebView2RuntimeInstallerX64: Self-hosted on v-assets-latest. Build fails if hash differs.
